title: Synchronous Process Execution
activity_flow: START: caller invokes execute() or executeTty()
[executeTty] DECISION: Platform::isTty()? → tty=true : tty=false
[execute] DECISION: output arg passed (func_num_args > 1)? → doExecute with $output ref : doExecute without output
BOTH call doExecute($command, $cwd, $tty, &$output)
doExecute: call outputCommandRun() → logs command to io->writeError() if debug mode (sanitizes credentials)
doExecute: set captureOutput = (func_num_args > 3), reset errorOutput = ''
doExecute: call requiresGitDirEnv($command) → check if git command needing GIT_DIR (show/log/branch/remote set-url)
DECISION: cwd !== null AND requiresGitDirEnv?
YES → DECISION: is bare repository (no .git subdir)?
YES → runProcess(['git','config','safe.bareRepository'], cwd, ['GIT_DIR'=>cwd], tty, $configValue)
DECISION: configValue === 'explicit'? → env = ['GIT_DIR' => cwd] : env = null
NO  → env = null
NO  → env = null
doExecute: call runProcess($command, $cwd, $env, $tty, &$output) → return exit code
runProcess: DECISION: command is string?
YES (string) → DECISION: Windows AND matches executable prefix?
YES → replace executable with self::getExecutable(match) (uses ExecutableFinder, skips builtins)
→ Process::fromShellCommandline($command, $cwd, $env, null, timeout)
NO (array) → DECISION: Windows AND no path separator in command[0]?
YES → command[0] = self::getExecutable(command[0])
→ new Process($command, $cwd, $env, null, timeout)
runProcess: DECISION: NOT Windows AND tty=true? → process->setTty(true) (catch RuntimeException, ignore)
runProcess: DECISION: $output is callable? → use $output as callback : use $this->outputHandler() closure
runProcess: register SignalHandler for SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP → on trigger, log 'Received X, aborting when child process is done'
runProcess: try { process->run($callback) }
process->run() streams output through callback on each chunk
outputHandler($type, $buffer):
DECISION: captureOutput? → return (suppress output)
DECISION: io is null? → echo $buffer directly
DECISION: type === ERR? → io->writeErrorRaw($buffer, false) : io->writeRaw($buffer, false)
runProcess: DECISION: captureOutput AND NOT callable($output)? → $output = process->getOutput()
runProcess: errorOutput = process->getErrorOutput()
runProcess: catch ProcessSignaledException → DECISION: signalHandler->isTriggered()? → signalHandler->exitWithLastSignal()
runProcess: finally { signalHandler->unregister() }
runProcess: return process->getExitCode()
END: exit code integer returned to original caller
key_decisions: executeTty: TTY mode only enabled if Platform::isTty() returns true
doExecute: captureOutput flag set only when output reference argument is provided
doExecute: bare git repo check triggers extra runProcess call to read safe.bareRepository config
doExecute: GIT_DIR env injected only for specific git subcommands (show, log, branch, remote set-url) in bare repos with explicit policy
runProcess: Windows path resolution uses ExecutableFinder; built-in CMD commands (assoc, dir, echo, etc.) are passed through unchanged
runProcess: TTY silently fails on Windows or if process rejects it (RuntimeException swallowed)
runProcess: custom callable output bypasses outputHandler entirely
outputHandler: when captureOutput=true all output is suppressed from io/echo (captured into $output var instead)
outputHandler: stderr vs stdout routed to io->writeErrorRaw vs io->writeRaw
data_flow: $output ref: passed caller → execute → doExecute → runProcess; populated via process->getOutput() if captureOutput
$errorOutput: set in runProcess via process->getErrorOutput(); accessible via getErrorOutput()
$env: null by default; set to ['GIT_DIR'=>$cwd] only for bare git repos with explicit safe.bareRepository
timeout: static $timeout (default 300s) passed to every Process constructor via getTimeout()
error_handling: ProcessSignaledException → if signal was triggered externally, calls exitWithLastSignal() (process exits)
SignalHandler always unregistered in finally block
Async startJob() rejects promise on Throwable during Process construction or start()
important_notes: Synchronous path: execute/executeTty → doExecute → runProcess → process.run() (blocking). No promises involved. captureOutput=true when &$output ref is passed. Credentials in command strings are redacted in debug logs (regex scrub for tokens/passwords). Windows requires special exe resolution via ExecutableFinder. Static $timeout=300s applies globally.
